hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'engine_state\.yml'; then echo 'BLOQUEADO: engine_state.yml so pode ser escrito pelo ft engine. Use ft continue/approve/reject.' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'ft_state.yml'; then ft validate state 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'mvp_status.*entregue'; then echo '⚠️  MVP gate check:' && ft validate gate mvp 2>&1 | tail -15; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'ft_state.yml'; then ft validate state 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'mvp_status.*entregue'; then echo '⚠️  MVP gate check:' && ft validate gate mvp 2>&1 | tail -15; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then ft validate state 2>&1 | tail -3; fi
